meanings.definition: an approximate calculation of quantity or degree or worth
examples: an estimate of what it would cost
a rough idea how long it would take

meanings.definition: a judgment of the qualities of something or somebody
examples: many factors are involved in any estimate of human life
in my estimation the boy is innocent

meanings.definition: a document appraising the value of something (as for insurance or taxation)
a statement indicating the likely cost of some job
examples: he got an estimate from the car repair shop

meanings.definition: the respect with which a person is held
examples: they had a high estimation of his ability

meanings.definition: judge tentatively or form an estimate of (quantities or time)
examples: I estimate this chicken to weigh three pounds
